title: Custom Waypoints
description: This mod allows you to create custom waypoints with extensive customization and utilities using commands.
body:
Custom Waypoints is a mod that allows you to create waypoints with commands and a lot of customization.

## **Base command:**

/waypoint 

1.21.8 - 1.21.11:

/customwaypoint

## **Features:**
- Display Waypoints on any postition
- Display Waypoints Timers and Counters
- Move any Waypoint to another postition with Custom Animation presets and Time!

## **Commands:**

**Text Commands:**

/waypoint set <id> <X> <Y> <Z> <scale> <rotation> <render> <background (true/false>)

/waypoint set <id> <X> <Y> <Z> <scale> <rotation> <render> <background (true) <bgcolor> <bgopacity> <bgscale> <bgstyle> <fadein> <anim_in> <anim_out> <textbackground> <text>

/waypoint set <id> <X> <Y> <Z> <scale> <rotation> <render> <background (false) <fadein> <anim_in> <anim_out> <textbackground> <text>

**Timer Commands:**

/waypoint timer set <id> <X> <Y> <Z> <scale> <rotation> <render> <background (true) <bgcolor> <bgopacity> <bgscale> <bgstyle> <fadein> <anim_in> <anim_out> <sound> <textbackground> <timer>

/waypoint stoptimer <id>

/waypoint resumetimer <id>

**Counter Commands:**

/waypoint counter set <id> <X> <Y> <Z> <scale> <rotation> <render> <background (true) <bgcolor> <bgopacity> <bgscale> <bgstyle> <fadein> <anim_in> <anim_out> <sound> <decimals><textbackground> <timer>

/waypoint stoptimer <id>

/waypoint resumetimer <id>

**Move Commands:**

/waypoint move <id> <X> <Y> <Z> <scale> <rotation> <interpolation> <time>

/waypoint move_reset <id> <interpolation> <time>

**Follow Command:**

/waypoint follow <id> <target> <offsetX> <offsetY> <offsetZ> <scale> <render> <background (true) <bgcolor> <bgopacity> <bgscale> <bgstyle> <fadein> <anim_in> <anim_out> <textbackground> <text>

**Remove Commands:**

/waypoint remove <id> <fadeout>

/waypoint remove_radius <id> <radius> <fadeout>

/waypoint list

## **TIPS:**
/n = multiline space | = space

Item Render in Line {"diamond"} Parameters: scale, nbt {"diamond,scale:1.5,nbt:3"}

{"diamond,s:1.5,n:3"} {"iron,s:0.6"}

Texture Render in line {"assets/...(textures.png)"}

Distance Parameter: {distance}

Example: /waypoint set shop 464.49 -51.71 -724.91 9 follow far_front false 20 scale_in scale_out false &eShop/n{distance}m

![Shop Waypoint Without Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b41edbfc6c3a87ed0b4ae9c2593d5a7ab93b546b_0.webp)
